channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Nebraska Democrats Vie in House Primary
DOJ and PayPal Settle $30 Million Agreement
item.description: The Justice Department has settled a case with PayPal regarding its program for minority-owned businesses.

item.title: Iran threatens retaliation against U.S. over potential attacks
item.description: Iranian officials state any new U.S. actions will face a negative response, amid escalating tensions and renewed violence in Lebanon.

item.title: Trump Addresses Iran, Inflation, and China Before Beijing Trip
item.description: President Trump answered questions from reporters on Iran, inflation, and other topics just before departing for Beijing Tuesday.
